task_completion.description: Log into NOSH ChartingSystem as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., showing 'Hillside Family Medicine' or admin user interface).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the new patient registration form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or modal for adding a new patient is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the patient's name, gender, and date of birth
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields for First Name ('Garfield'), Last Name ('Lebsack'), Gender ('Male'), and DOB ('May 16, 1962' or '05/16/1962') are filled out correctly in the form.

task_completion.description: Enter the patient's address, phone number, and email
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields for Address ('58 Spruce St', 'Ludlow', 'MA', '01056'), Phone ('413-555-9901'), and Email ('garfield.lebsack@example.com') are filled out correctly in the form.
A success message indicating the patient was added, or the newly created patient chart for 'Garfield Lebsack' is displayed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into actual application form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient details are typed into the specific input fields of the EHR system, not just written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success screen
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to manipulate the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires registering a new patient in the NOSH ChartingSystem web application. Patient details to verify: Name: Garfield Lebsack, Gender: Male, DOB: May 16, 1962 (1962-05-16), Address: 58 Spruce St, Ludlow, MA 01056, Phone: 413-555-9901, Email: garfield.lebsack@example.com. The practice name is 'Hillside Family Medicine'.
